tEn: AI and the Future of Luxembourg: A Fireside Chat with the Prime Minister and Mistral AI CEO
tZh: AI与卢森堡的未来：与首相和Mistral AI CEO的炉边谈话
sEn: Prime Minister Frieden discusses Luxembourg's AI vision, data sovereignty, and a new strategic partnership with Mistral AI, while CEO Arthur Mensch shares insights on AI's real-world impact and growth milestones.
sZh: 弗里登首相畅谈卢森堡的AI愿景、数据主权以及与Mistral AI的新战略合作，CEO阿瑟·门施则分享了AI的实际影响和增长里程碑。

consensus.en: AI must be embraced as an opportunity, not feared for risks.
consensus.zh: AI必须被视为机遇，而非因风险而畏惧。

consensus.en: Sovereign AI requires control over data, infrastructure, and values.
consensus.zh: 主权AI需要控制数据、基础设施和价值观。

consensus.en: AI will augment jobs, not replace them, requiring human-in-the-loop.
consensus.zh: AI将增强而非取代工作，需要人类参与循环。

consensus.en: Education must focus on creativity and AI literacy for future careers.
consensus.zh: 教育必须注重创造力和AI素养，以应对未来职业。

consensus.en: Strategic partnerships between governments and AI companies are key.
consensus.zh: 政府与AI公司之间的战略合作伙伴关系是关键。

contrarian.en: AI should be decentralized, not controlled by a single provider.
contrarian.zh: AI应该去中心化，而非由单一提供商控制。

contrarian.en: Open-source models empower enterprises more than centralized systems.
contrarian.zh: 开源模型比集中式系统更能赋能企业。

contrarian.en: AI will not remove jobs soon; it changes work nature instead.
contrarian.zh: AI不会很快消除工作；它改变的是工作性质。

contrarian.en: European AI sovereignty requires local customization, not one-size-fits-all.
contrarian.zh: 欧洲AI主权需要本地定制，而非一刀切。

contrarian.en: Governments should embrace AI risks and experiment, not avoid them.
contrarian.zh: 政府应拥抱AI风险并尝试，而非回避。

turns.en: Thank you, your royal highness, for sharing your thoughts, visions, and ambitions about technology and the future of Luxembourg with us. And continuing about the future of Luxembourg and the rapid development of artificial intelligence, we have a very special fireside chat with Prime Minister Frerieden and Arthur Mensch, the co-founder and CEO of Mistral AI. Please help me welcome them to the stage with a thunderous applause.
turns.zh: 感谢殿下与我们分享关于技术和卢森堡未来的想法、愿景和抱负。继续关于卢森堡的未来和人工智能的快速发展，我们与弗里登首相和Mistral AI的联合创始人兼CEO Arthur Mensch进行一场非常特别的炉边谈话。请用热烈的掌声欢迎他们上台。

turns.en: Nice to meet you. Um maybe here or maybe here. Yeah, here would be okay. Yes, that would be perfect. So, thank you for joining us in this very special fireside in the opening ceremony of Nexus Luxembourg 2025. And one of our crucial themes of Nexus is actually artificial intelligence and AI. So, that's what this fireside chat will be about and it'll cover these themes.
turns.zh: 很高兴见到你。嗯，也许这里，也许这里。是的，这里可以。对，这样完美。所以，感谢你们加入我们在2025年卢森堡Nexus开幕式上的这场非常特别的炉边谈话。Nexus的一个关键主题实际上是人工智能和AI。所以，这场炉边谈话将围绕这些主题展开。

turns.en: So, my first question would be to Prime Minister Frerieden. Under your leadership, Luxembourg has taken a lead in the AI domain and it is one of the 13 AI factories in Europe with the opening of supercomputer Meluxina. So, how do you see the country's progress on AI unfold by 2030?
turns.zh: 所以，我的第一个问题是给弗里登首相。在您的领导下，卢森堡在AI领域处于领先地位，并且随着超级计算机Meluxina的启用，它成为欧洲13个AI工厂之一。那么，您如何看待到2030年该国在AI方面的进展？

transcript.sec: Prime Minister's Vision for AI in Luxembourg

turns.en: First of all, I think that you need to have a vision for your country and you have to embrace in that vision and that's certainly the case of my government technological developments. So to remain a modern country and to be a leader in certain areas, you also in this context need to embrace AI. And so while many in the world are saying that this has a lot of risks that come with it, we see mostly an opportunity in it. So that is the first point.
turns.zh: 首先，我认为你需要为你的国家有一个愿景，并且你必须拥抱这个愿景，我的政府的技术发展当然也是如此。因此，为了保持一个现代国家并在某些领域成为领导者，在这种情况下你也需要拥抱AI。虽然世界上很多人说这伴随着很多风险，但我们主要看到的是机遇。这是第一点。

turns.en: The second point in this vision is that we believe that AI has to go together with a sovereign data economy that is actually part of a sovereign data economy. And by that I mean especially in a complex geopolitical environment that we should be sure who controls the data. And if I say sovereign, that does not mean Luxembourgish sovereign, but I think in terms of a European sovereignty. And so that is a key element in making sure that we have a Europe and in that a strong Luxembourg where we have the right data and that we control what we do with those data and that in turn is of course extremely important for AI to succeed.
turns.zh: 这个愿景的第二点是，我们相信AI必须与主权数据经济相结合，这实际上是主权数据经济的一部分。我的意思是，特别是在复杂的地缘政治环境中，我们应该确保谁控制数据。如果我说主权，那并不意味着卢森堡的主权，而是指欧洲的主权。因此，这是确保我们拥有一个欧洲，以及一个强大的卢森堡的关键要素，在那里我们拥有正确的数据，并控制我们用这些数据做什么，这反过来对AI的成功当然极其重要。

turns.en: Then next to that vision, this philosophy, we need the right infrastructure. The right infrastructure, you mentioned this supercomputer is extremely important that we have adequate amount of data centers that we have appropriate energy and acceptable cost and all that is important to make the vision a reality. The reality also means that we need to have use cases. AI cannot just stay there as a theoretical thought. We need to apply it for businesses, for people, for governments. Yes, for everybody, for human, for humanity and therefore you need partners. You need partners in Luxembourg and around Luxembourg. And that is why I'm very happy to sit here together with Arthur Mensch, CEO of Mistral AI. And just before coming here, we signed together a strategic partnership, a strategic partnership between the government of Luxembourg and Mistral AI, which is the leading European AI company to make sure that we collaborate for the businesses, for private people, for the government. We have embarked the process of identifying projects where Mistral AI can help the Luxembourg government to work better, faster, but also in the interest of all people. And I think that is really the way we want to go forward. A vision, an infrastructure and partners that are coming from other places in Europe. And by that we strengthen the European AI sovereignty. And by the way, our this partnership that we signed this morning, we discussed it for the first time at the AI summit in Paris. We met then, we discussed because we believe like some others at this AI summit in Paris that Europe has a role to play in the future of AI.
turns.zh: 除了这个愿景和理念，我们还需要正确的基础设施。正确的基础设施，你提到的超级计算机非常重要，我们需要足够的数据中心、适当的能源和可接受的成本，所有这些对于实现愿景都很重要。现实也意味着我们需要有使用案例。AI不能仅仅停留在理论思考上。我们需要将其应用于企业、人民、政府。是的，为了每个人，为了人类，为了人性，因此你需要合作伙伴。你需要卢森堡境内和周边的合作伙伴。这就是为什么我非常高兴与Mistral AI的CEO Arthur Mensch坐在一起。就在来这里之前，我们共同签署了一项战略合作伙伴关系，这是卢森堡政府与Mistral AI之间的战略合作伙伴关系，Mistral AI是欧洲领先的AI公司，以确保我们为企业、个人和政府合作。我们已经开始确定项目，Mistral AI可以帮助卢森堡政府更好、更快地工作，同时也符合所有人的利益。我认为这正是我们前进的方向。一个愿景、基础设施和来自欧洲其他地方的合作伙伴。通过这种方式，我们加强了欧洲AI的主权。顺便说一句，我们今天早上签署的这项合作伙伴关系，我们第一次讨论是在巴黎的AI峰会上。我们当时见面并讨论，因为像巴黎AI峰会上的其他人一样，我们相信欧洲在AI的未来中可以发挥作用。

transcript.sec: Host's Reaction and Question to Arthur Mensch

turns.en: Wow, that's amazing and incredible. And I think one thing which is so special is the use of AI for as you said better governance enhancing mankind and I think that partnership is the key to doing this. So could we actually give a huge round of applause for this strategic partnership because it's amazing. And some of you may remember as Sophia said last year, technology is only good if it is used for the purpose of enhancement of mankind. So actually continuing on this thread, hello Arthur and welcome to Luxembourg first of all and congratulations on your newly announced partnership with Nvidia at Vivatech and also on your newly announced partnership on this stage in Nexus with Luxembourg. So thank you so much for that. So Mistral AI is a unicorn and it has a valuation of 5 billion euros. How do you see the next leg of your company in terms of technology and growth and what are some key milestones ahead specifically with partnerships?
turns.zh: 哇，这太棒了，令人难以置信。我认为特别的一点是，正如你所说，AI用于更好的治理和提升人类，我认为合作伙伴关系是实现这一点的关键。那么，我们能否为这一战略合作伙伴关系报以热烈的掌声？这太棒了。有些人可能还记得，正如Sophia去年所说，技术只有在用于提升人类的目的时才是好的。所以，继续这个话题，你好Arthur，首先欢迎来到卢森堡，祝贺你刚刚在Vivatech宣布与Nvidia的合作伙伴关系，以及在这个Nexus舞台上与卢森堡宣布的新合作伙伴关系。非常感谢。那么，Mistral AI是一家独角兽公司，估值50亿欧元。您如何看待公司在技术和增长方面的下一步？特别是在合作伙伴关系方面，有哪些关键里程碑？

transcript.secZh: 主持人对Arthur Mensch的回应与提问

transcript.sec: Arthur Mensch on Mistral AI's Growth and Partnerships

turns.en: So I guess first thank you very much for hosting us and I should say, to add to what Mr. Prime Minister said just before, that we've been impressed by the speed and execution of the team and the conviction that your team had on executing fast and on bringing AI to be used for citizens. And so I think that's very telling of the right governance that you've set on technology. And so thank you very much for helping us make that happen.
turns.zh: 首先，非常感谢你们接待我们，我想补充首相先生刚才所说的，我们对团队的速度和执行能力以及你们团队在快速执行和将AI用于公民方面的信念印象深刻。所以我认为这充分说明了你们在技术方面建立的正确治理。非常感谢你们帮助我们实现这一点。

turns.en: For us, we've announced a few aspects around expanding toward infrastructure last week, but what we see today is that compared to when we started two years ago, we're starting to see real use cases, real value being created in enterprises, being created in public services. What AI brings is the capacity to scale communication and it brings in particular for public services the ability to make sure that every citizen has access to the information it needs, has access to the services it needs, and that's true for education, that's going to be true for education, that's going to be true for healthcare, that's going to be true for anything that is related to being a citizen in a country. And so the partnership that we're announcing today is really, I think, a template for what could be done in all countries in the world.
turns.zh: 对我们来说，上周我们宣布了向基础设施扩展的几个方面，但今天我们看到的是，与两年前我们开始时相比，我们开始看到真正的使用案例，在企业中、在公共服务中创造真正的价值。AI带来的是扩展沟通的能力，特别是对于公共服务，它能够确保每个公民都能获得所需的信息，获得所需的服务，这对教育如此，对医疗保健如此，对任何与公民身份相关的事情都是如此。因此，我们今天宣布的合作伙伴关系，我认为，确实是全世界所有国家都可以效仿的模板。

turns.en: As you mentioned, sovereignty and AI is going to be extremely important. We're talking about a technology that is going to drive multiple digits of the GDP, that is going to be involved in a lot of strategic aspects around defense as well. And I guess perhaps more importantly, this is a content generation technology. So what that means is that we're talking about models that are generating text, that are orchestrating workflows, that are helping taking decisions. And when you're deploying such technology, you need to make sure of two things.
turns.zh: 正如你提到的，主权和AI将变得极其重要。我们谈论的是一项将推动GDP多个百分点的技术，它还将涉及许多战略方面，包括国防。也许更重要的是，这是一项内容生成技术。这意味着我们谈论的是生成文本、编排工作流程、帮助决策的模型。当部署这样的技术时，你需要确保两件事。

transcript.secZh: Arthur Mensch谈Mistral AI的增长与合作伙伴关系

turns.en: First of all, you have the keys to turn it on and turn it off. Because if you start deploying it on infrastructure that is critical to the functioning of a country, then you really want to make sure that nobody can tell you, 'If you don't tell me what I want you to do, I'm going to turn it off.' So that's an important aspect. And then there's a more cultural aspect, content aspect, which is to say, I have certain values that I want my systems to respect. I want my systems to follow certain guardrails. I want them to know about my culture. I want them to know about my language. And in those aspects, we believe there's no one-size-fits-all solution. We need to work with local partners. We need to collaborate with universities to bring local knowledge, local culture into the systems themselves. So that's what we've been doing across multiple countries that we're announcing today with Luxembourg. We've been doing it in Southeast Asia. And we do expect that in Europe in particular, which is as multicultural as you can find, there are multiple opportunities in building AI systems that can be deployed with all the control you need and that can be customized to incorporate values and the specificity of every region where we operate.
turns.zh: 首先，你拥有开启和关闭它的钥匙。因为如果你将其部署在对国家运作至关重要的基础设施上，那么你确实要确保没有人能威胁你说：‘如果你不按我说的做，我就关掉它。’所以这是一个重要方面。然后还有一个更文化性、内容性的方面，也就是说，我希望我的系统尊重某些价值观。我希望我的系统遵循某些护栏。我希望它们了解我的文化。我希望它们了解我的语言。在这些方面，我们认为没有放之四海而皆准的解决方案。我们需要与当地合作伙伴合作。我们需要与大学合作，将当地知识和当地文化融入系统本身。这就是我们一直在多个国家做的事情，今天我们与卢森堡宣布了合作。我们在东南亚也在这样做。我们预计，尤其是在欧洲这个文化最多元的地方，有很多机会构建可以完全控制部署、并能根据每个地区的价值观和特殊性进行定制的AI系统。

turns.en: That's amazing and thank you for that. And sovereign AI is very important. As you mentioned, AI will definitely bring a huge boost to the global economy. In fact, JP Morgan research estimates that the AI boom can bring between 7 to 10 trillion dollars by 2030, which is an increase of 10% to the global economy. So now that we've looked ahead to the future a little bit, let's step back a few years. You co-founded Mistral AI two years ago in 2023 and now it is Europe's bright star in AI. So let's talk a little bit about the inspiration behind the origin of Mistral AI. Is there a meaning behind the name Mistral?
turns.zh: 太棒了，谢谢。主权AI非常重要。正如你提到的，AI肯定会给全球经济带来巨大推动。事实上，摩根大通研究估计，到2030年，AI热潮可以带来7到10万亿美元的增长，相当于全球经济增加10%。既然我们已经展望了一下未来，让我们回到几年前。你在2023年联合创立了Mistral AI，现在它是欧洲AI领域的耀眼明星。我们来谈谈Mistral AI创立的灵感。Mistral这个名字有什么含义吗？

turns.en: I guess Mistral, as you may know, although it doesn't blow here, it's actually a French wind. And there's an 'I' and an 'A', which are the two vowels of Mistral. That happens to mean 'Intelligence Artificielle' in French. So for those here who speak French, and I guess many of you do, that means artificial intelligence. So that's probably why we came up with this name.
turns.zh: 我想Mistral，你可能知道，虽然这里不刮这种风，但它实际上是法国的一种风。而Mistral这个词里有‘I’和‘A’两个元音，恰好是法语‘Intelligence Artificielle’（人工智能）的缩写。所以对于在座说法语的朋友，我想很多人都会，这意思就是人工智能。所以我们可能就是因为这个取了这个名字。

turns.en: And is there a specific distinguishing philosophy of Mistral?
turns.zh: Mistral有没有什么独特的哲学理念？

turns.en: Well, I guess the reason why we created the company is that my two co-founders and I were scientists in big tech companies and we thought this was an inflection point in technology. With any inflection point comes opportunity to actually bring a new offering to the market. What we realized was that the offerings that were there in 2023 were extremely centralized. The pitch you could hear was: 'Go to us, bring us your data, connect everything to our centralized control system, and we're going to deploy AI. We will build AGI. It will become the only provider of such a technology.' And we wanted AI, and I guess general purpose models, and maybe at some point AGI, to be more decentralized. So we thought: no states are going to want to depend on a single company to actually deploy the technology. So let's build open systems. Let's build systems that can be deployed everywhere, that can be customized, and bring them to everyone. Do some knowledge transfer work with enterprises to make them empowered in AI. So we wanted to promote that more decentralized system, that more empowering system, and we thought it was actually needed in the world. So that was the vision, and it's still the vision we have. And then opportunistically, we realized that Europe had a very big talent pool in AI and that those people actually wanted to do something else and not work in big tech companies. So that's how we started. We got 15 people out of different big techs with a lot of expertise, and we worked on full science for the first eight months. We released open source models, took leadership there, and ever since we've been building the company around the product that sits on top of models to build applications, and also around the expertise of the forward deployment team, the knowledge transfer team that actually works with enterprises and makes them empowered, helps them build value with AI.
turns.zh: 嗯，我们创立公司的原因是，我和两位联合创始人之前都是大科技公司的科学家，我们认为这正是一个技术转折点。任何转折点都伴随着将新产品推向市场的机会。我们意识到，2023年市场上的产品极其集中。你听到的宣传是：‘来找我们，把你的数据带来，把所有东西连接到我们的集中控制系统，我们来部署AI。我们将构建AGI。我们将成为这项技术的唯一提供商。’而我们希望AI，以及通用模型，也许有一天AGI，能更加去中心化。所以我们想：没有一个国家会愿意依赖单一公司来部署这项技术。因此，让我们构建开放系统。让我们构建可以随处部署、可以定制的系统，并把它们带给每个人。与企业进行知识转移，让他们在AI方面获得能力。所以我们想推广这种更加去中心化、更能赋能的系统，我们认为世界确实需要这个。这就是我们的愿景，至今未变。然后机缘巧合，我们意识到欧洲有非常庞大的AI人才库，而且这些人其实想做点别的事情，不想在大科技公司工作。所以我们就这样开始了。我们从不同的大科技公司招募了15位经验丰富的人，前八个月全力做科研。我们发布了开源模型，取得了领先地位，从那以后，我们一直围绕模型之上的产品来构建公司，以构建应用，同时也围绕前向部署团队和知识转移团队的专业知识，这些团队与企业合作，赋能他们，帮助他们用AI创造价值。

turns.en: Amazing. That's really interesting. And actually that makes me wonder, Prime Minister Frieden, how do you view Luxembourg adopting AI to improve the standards of living, bring ease of governance, and prepare the students of tomorrow?
turns.zh: 太棒了，这真的很有意思。这让我想问，弗里登首相，您如何看待卢森堡采用AI来改善生活水平、简化治理以及为未来的学生做好准备？

turns.en: AI will impact all aspects of life, so we need now to identify the use cases where it has the biggest impact. I think there are many areas, and that's also why in this memorandum that we signed this morning, we identified a number of areas, but some of them we do not yet know today. Because we said we should work together with academia and research. We should work together with institutions or parts of institutions like the Luxembourg army. We will work together on how to speed up the implementation of EU laws into national legislation with large language models. So I think there are numerous aspects where AI can help us shape the world in a different manner: health, space, finance, areas in which we are active. I think there AI can also play a major role. But again, I want to bring that into the more general philosophy of our country. For a country to shape the future, you need to do something. Some people believe that the status quo can assure you that you remain where you are. We believe that if there is technological progress, you need to embrace it. You need to explore things. And to remain a leading country in finance, to remain a leading country in space, you need to add AI to it. And that is the philosophy with which we are going forward. The other aspect which is very dear to our heart and our philosophy is that we believe in an open economy, that means also cross-border cooperation. So while we are sitting here together, that also goes for other companies in the audience and beyond. Luxembourg became what it is today because we were always open: open-minded, open to foreign investors, trying to speak different languages, trying to have a public service that is at the service of the companies who want to use Luxembourg as a gateway to Europe and to the world. And for AI, that is also what we want to achieve.
turns.zh: AI将影响生活的方方面面，所以我们现在需要确定它影响最大的用例。我认为有很多领域，这也是为什么在今天早上签署的备忘录中，我们确定了一些领域，但有些领域我们今天还不知道。因为我们说过，我们应该与学术界和研究机构合作。我们应该与机构或机构的一部分（如卢森堡军队）合作。我们将合作研究如何利用大语言模型加速将欧盟法律转化为国家立法。所以我认为AI可以在许多方面帮助我们以不同的方式塑造世界：健康、太空、金融，这些我们活跃的领域。我认为AI在这些领域也能发挥重要作用。但我想再次将其纳入我们国家更普遍的哲学。一个国家要塑造未来，就必须有所行动。有些人认为维持现状可以确保你原地不动。我们相信，如果有技术进步，你需要拥抱它。你需要探索。为了保持金融领域的领先国家，为了保持太空领域的领先国家，你需要将AI融入其中。这就是我们前进的哲学。另一个我们非常珍视的方面是我们的哲学，即我们相信开放经济，这意味着跨境合作。所以当我们坐在这里时，这也适用于在座的其他公司以及更广的范围。卢森堡之所以成为今天的卢森堡，是因为我们始终开放：思想开放，对外国投资者开放，尝试说不同的语言，努力让公共服务服务于那些希望将卢森堡作为通往欧洲和世界门户的公司。对于AI，这也是我们希望实现的。

turns.en: Thank you so much. And it's really cool to see how AI will touch almost all of our domains in the next 5 to 10 years. Arthur, there is a widespread fear about AI threatening jobs and the job loss versus job enrichment debate has become heated.
turns.zh: 非常感谢。看到AI在未来5到10年将触及我们几乎所有领域，真的很酷。Arthur，人们普遍担心AI会威胁就业，关于失业与工作丰富的争论已经变得激烈。

turns.en: So what message would you like to give to our audience and how should they prepare themselves to be an AI proof career?
turns.zh: 那么您想给我们的观众传达什么信息？他们应该如何为打造一个不受AI影响的职业做准备？

turns.en: So I don't think that AI is going to change and remove jobs anytime soon. On the other hand, it does change the nature of the work that we need to be doing. There are a lot of tasks that AI allows us to do today, which are around synthesizing information, thinking about information, and doing research that are actually very much facilitated with AI, but you still need to have a human in the loop to actually control it, give it goals, give it feedback. So what we see happening today is not really a replacement but more of a symbiosis between AI and humans. In order for the symbiosis to happen, I think what is very important is to focus on training teams and on skilling teams. That's true for high school, that's true in universities. Students need to be learning differently and they need to be learning about how to use AI because a lot of the tasks that they will be asked to do are going to involve using AI. Today, if you're a software developer for instance, you should really learn software development knowing that you have access to generators of code and things that can help you go very fast when it comes to building. So what that tells you is that there are a lot of things that you will no longer need to know in detail, but the one thing you will still need to know very strongly is how to be curious, how to have ideas, and how to use AI to leverage those ideas. So it will give bonus points to creativity. I think what we need to learn in enterprises and in schools is really how to be more creative and how to unleash your potential knowing that you have AI agents that are operating in the background that are going to drive your productivity forward. So it's not about replacing jobs. It's really about replacing the nature of work, and that will take some effort. I think everybody needs to look at how to use it. They need to be using it every day and figuring out what the frontiers are. There are things that do not work yet, and you need to know about those limits as well. If you do so as a worker, you will have a lot more agency, and that's how we will be driving productivity forward. So for me, the biggest thing is really to learn about the technology and to learn how to embrace it the same way we have with smartphones, the same way we have with the internet. This is not different; it's more powerful, but we can do it, and we've always been able to adapt to the new tools that humanity has created.
turns.zh: 我认为AI不会很快改变或取代工作岗位。另一方面，它确实改变了我们工作的性质。如今AI能完成许多任务，比如综合信息、思考信息、做研究，这些都因AI而变得非常便利，但你仍然需要有人类参与来控制它、设定目标、提供反馈。所以我们今天看到的不是替代，而是AI与人类之间的共生关系。为了实现这种共生，我认为非常重要的一点是专注于培训团队和提升团队技能。这在高中和大学都是如此。学生需要以不同的方式学习，他们需要学习如何使用AI，因为他们未来要做的很多工作都会涉及AI。例如，如果你是一名软件开发者，你真的应该学习软件开发，同时知道你可以使用代码生成器等工具来帮助你快速构建。这说明你不再需要详细了解很多事情，但你仍然需要非常强烈地知道如何保持好奇心、如何产生想法、以及如何利用AI来放大这些想法。所以它会为创造力加分。我认为企业和学校需要学习的是如何更具创造力，以及如何释放你的潜力，知道有AI智能体在后台运作，推动你的生产力前进。所以这不是关于取代工作，而是关于改变工作的性质，这需要一些努力。我认为每个人都需要研究如何使用它。他们需要每天使用它，并找出前沿在哪里。有些东西还不起作用，你也需要了解这些限制。如果你作为工作者这样做，你将拥有更多的自主权，这就是我们推动生产力前进的方式。所以对我来说，最重要的事情就是学习这项技术，并学会拥抱它，就像我们拥抱智能手机和互联网一样。这没什么不同，它更强大，但我们可以做到，而且我们一直能够适应人类创造的新工具。

turns.en: Wow, thank you so much for this uplifting message. So, be curious, upskill and leverage AI. Honorable Prime Minister, what is your vision for Luxembourg becoming ground zero in innovation to support European growth?
turns.zh: 哇，非常感谢您这个令人振奋的信息。所以，保持好奇、提升技能、利用AI。尊敬的首相，您对卢森堡成为支持欧洲增长的创新发源地有何愿景？

turns.en: First of all, I fully share the view that Arthur just mentioned. I think education plays a key role there. The general education but also then more sophisticated degrees that prepare the people for using the new tools in an appropriate manner. And we have also embarked on offering programs at the university that especially focus in that direction. In general, I think we need to be open to technological development as a government. We need to create the right framework, not to say 'wow this is too difficult, this might create risks,' but say 'wow this is something new, let's try it.' That's the philosophy that we need to have. We did so in many areas in the past. When the fintechs arrived, traditional banks were worried. When the internet came, probably many people thought 'how can we control the information, how do we identify the right information from the wrong information,' and we are still struggling with that in social media today. But still, if you look back, each technological progress has brought big advantages for the population. I think it's our role as a country who wants to be a leader in the sovereign data economy, who wants to be a leader in financial services, who wants to have a leading role in space satellites and so on, to use the new technology including of course AI, data, quantum technology, to create an ecosystem, a multicultural, an international ecosystem where this can be a showcase for the rest of Europe. That is our ambition.
turns.zh: 首先，我完全赞同Arthur刚才的观点。我认为教育在其中扮演关键角色。不仅是普通教育，还有更高级的学位，让人们学会以适当的方式使用新工具。我们已经在大学里推出了专门针对这一方向的课程。总的来说，我认为作为政府，我们需要对技术发展持开放态度。我们需要创造合适的框架，不是要说‘哇这太难了，可能会带来风险’，而是要说‘哇这是新东西，让我们试试’。这就是我们需要秉持的理念。我们在过去的许多领域都是这样做的。当金融科技出现时，传统银行很担心。当互联网来临时，可能很多人想‘我们如何控制信息，如何辨别正确和错误的信息’，而我们在今天的社交媒体上仍然在为此挣扎。但尽管如此，回顾过去，每一次技术进步都给民众带来了巨大好处。我认为，作为一个希望在主权数据经济中成为领导者、在金融服务中成为领导者、在太空卫星等领域发挥主导作用的国家，我们的角色是利用新技术，当然包括AI、数据、量子技术，来创建一个生态系统，一个多元文化、国际化的生态系统，使其成为欧洲其他地区的典范。这就是我们的雄心。

turns.en: Thank you so much for this bright and uplifting message about the future of Luxembourg in the heart of Europe. Thank you so much for sharing your insights with us. Thank you Prime Minister Frieden for sharing your insights and time. Thank you. Thank you Arthur Mensch as well for sharing your views and let's respect them with a thunderous applause. Thank you so much.
turns.zh: 非常感谢您关于卢森堡在欧洲中心未来的光明而振奋人心的信息。非常感谢您与我们分享您的见解。感谢弗里登首相分享您的见解和时间。谢谢。也感谢Arthur Mensch分享您的观点，让我们以雷鸣般的掌声向他们致敬。非常感谢。
